creator: joneum@FreeBSD.org
text:
Can you check the diff?

Here a an error with poudriere: http://joneumbox.org/data/120amd64-ports/2019-03-02_01h02m15s/logs/errors/gitea-1.7.3.log

====> Running Q/A tests (stage-qa)
====> Checking for pkg-plist issues (check-plist)
===> Parsing plist
===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/public/vendor/plugins/es6-promise/es6-promise.auto.min.js
===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
